title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.560 - Failure to elect officers — procedure
text:
80.560.  Failure to elect officers — procedure. — If the trustees fail to call the municipal election, a majority of the trustees then in office, or any associate circuit judge of the county in which said town or village is situated, may call the election.
(RSMo 1939 § 7294, A. 1949 H.B. 2030, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971 merged with H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7143; 1919 § 8592; 1909 § 9480 
Effective 8-13-78 (H.B. 971); 1-2-79 (H.B. 1634)
